code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut count = 0

while i < n
  mut skipped = false
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(c)
    if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
      i = i + 1
      skipped = true
    end
  when None
    i = i + 1
    skipped = true
  end
  if not skipped
    mut sign = 1
    mut value = 0
    mut has_digit = false
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if c == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut parsing = true
    while parsing
      if i >= n
        parsing = false
      else
        match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(d)
          if d >= 48 and d <= 57
            value = value * 10 + (d - 48)
            has_digit = true
            i = i + 1
          else
            parsing = false
          end
        when None
          parsing = false
        end
      end
    end
    if has_digit
      let signed = value * sign
      if signed > 0
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
  end
end

println("positive=#{count}")
